insight: Zine secret hardening must migrate keys-store and every signer/derivation consumer, not only identity.ts and models-store.ts; KeyEntry.secretHex currently feeds MODEL voice, Keys, Networking/onion, Doors, provenance, workspace, Send, and Attest.
Exact historical Send, Attest, and Send-and-Attest belong inside replay tabs and target the displayed node; the global palette remains live-focus routed.

The prepared-operation layer detects dirty target and mounted inputs and fingerprints the exact rendered request, but live App.tsx MODEL handlers still use gatherContextForPanel plus prepareLlmMeta directly. They can send live file bodies while the resulting LLM Step cites older manifest head ids, and preparedRequestHash/contextFingerprint are not persisted in LlmStepMeta.

A file-level scope:llm marker cannot classify mixed q relationships: one event may quote a source, rely on it as analysis evidence, and also send it as model context. Bind a signed role set to each q-tag index and let readers index each role independently.

For Zine AI tasks, preserve cumulative readable transcript snapshots on every accepted turn even when storage grows; optimize with content-addressed deduplication and make any compaction an explicit trace-preserving action.

Stronghold snapshot save uses scrypt at its normal security work factor; in an otherwise-unoptimized Tauri dev build it pinned one core for minutes, and fresh bootstrap amplified the delay by saving once per generated key. Preserve work factors, optimize the KDF dependency packages in the dev profile, and batch bootstrap/migration writes into one snapshot save.

Folder row activation must route to focus-only selectFolder while explicit context-menu Open routes to openFolder; merging them creates an unwanted folder tab and prevents replay-only focus. Root uses an empty folder path, so focusReplayTarget must check folder kind before rejecting empty file paths.

Folder replay can only start at inception when UI folder creation mints an empty folder genesis, cites it from the parent membership, persists its traceId, and returns that identity to App state. A path-only emptyFolders marker leaves replay with no folder event, so the first descendant file incorrectly becomes Step 0.

Single-file replay already maps the signed file genesis to Step index 0; the blank pre-content frame is an unnumbered action frame that shares index 0 only for state reconstruction. The replay status must detect genesis by the absence of e...prev before the generic mutation branch, labeling the durable checkpoint Genesis while retaining an exact same-frame mutation when present.

When the Stronghold snapshot is absent but webview localStorage survives, current public key profiles can still contain opaque refs that cannot exist in the newly created vault. Pass the native fresh-vault state into migration, retire only unresolved key profiles, clear unresolved provider credential claims, and keep ordinary unlock fail-closed so an existing vault never silently replaces identities.
An accepted model reply file is owned and signed by the author and remains editable through later Steps; model Runs assert contribution provenance but do not become the file signing authority.
Cumulative full snapshots need local and per-relay wire-size budgets plus transparent storage deduplication before public release; oversized work must compact, reply, fork, or remain local.
The q tag remains a social reply or quote edge; searchable LLM context backlinks require a distinct context-dependency tag, while ordered authoritative context IDs stay in event content.
Persist the exact signed Step bytes and their local acceptance record in one SQLite transaction before any relay send; retry must resend those unchanged bytes.

For Zine multi-device ownership, keep a stable logical owner manifest while every device retains distinct signing and encryption keys; owner-root, owner-recovery, and archive-recovery remain separate capabilities.
Use direct P2P as the normal private replication path, but retain encrypted store-and-forward for devices that are not online together; keep the rendezvous DHT discovery-only.

The user wants trace publication to reveal provenance and timing evidence; private sync protects unpublished content and authorization, not traffic-analysis anonymity or eventual metadata concealment.

The local workspace may stay flat and path-indexed, but every wire write must resolve the final segment to its direct folder trace and bubble the changed child folder nucleus and canonical hash through every ancestor.

Desktop factory reset closes the active Stronghold session before deleting its snapshot. In tauri-plugin-stronghold 2.3.1, Stronghold.unload() invokes plugin:stronghold|destroy, which is intentionally excluded from stronghold:default; the main-window capability must explicitly grant stronghold:allow-destroy. Keep a regression test against the real capability JSON.

For replayable human-AI work, Step & Continue must durably commit the human AUTHOR Step and exact dispatch intent before provider I/O; accepting the completed result is a separate MODEL Step commit. Later failure preserves the AUTHOR turn rather than erasing the conversation.

Closing an OpenAI-compatible HTTP/SSE stream proves only that the client stopped receiving; without provider acknowledgement the execution and billing outcome must remain unknown, and partial output must remain ineligible.

A native secure-store boundary must not expose generic event signing. Because a Nostr event ID excludes the signature, native code can prepare and inspect an exact candidate ID, then revalidate/load/sign/commit it through purpose-specific capabilities.

For Zine mobile, each device should generate and retain its own signing and encryption keys; unified authorship should come from separately reviewed logical-owner authorization evidence, never by moving desktop keys onto the phone.

MODEL onboarding must create the lesson folder trace before calling writeFile for nested lesson artifacts; recursive workspace writes fail closed when the containing folder has no durable trace identity.
The user explicitly prefers Zine current clean lines and dense desktop layout; external references may inform product philosophy but should not trigger a visual redesign.
Text is the arrangement, Trace is the process/performance, Replay is the inspection experience, and a human-AI review is itself a traced Zine composition citing the source trace.

The shared live Send helper publishes a TraceHead cache in addition to the immutable node. Headless MCP exact handoff must route Send through the exact historical-node publisher so only the selected signed file nucleus crosses the publication boundary; real-relay tests should assert private predecessor ids and the trace-head d-tag remain absent.

On an ACL-protected Khatru relay, the first protected REQ can close auth-required while nostr-tools answers AUTH but does not replay that closed subscription. Authenticate and issue a new REQ before diagnosing missing publication; successful outbox publish acknowledgements plus a byte-identical authenticated reread distinguish this visibility race from durability loss.

The hosted download guard used a substring search for dot-dot, which rejected safe installer names such as release..dmg. Match explicit parent-directory path segments instead; http.FileServer continues to contain paths within the configured root.

The Rust job runs Tauri build-time validation, so deleting and gitignoring apps/client/src-tauri/binaries/zine-relay makes cargo test fail in clean checkouts while local verification can pass when a prior dogfood build leaves the ignored resource behind. Clean verification must either generate the resource or use a test-only Tauri config that omits bundle resources.

Tauri Cargo tests require apps/client/src-tauri/binaries/zine-relay even though the resource is gitignored; clean verification must build that Go binary before Cargo, and local stale copies can otherwise mask CI failures.

When a PR contains commits already present only on local main, GitHub squash-merge makes origin/main diverge from the unsquashed local history; preserve the clean local main and reconcile deliberately instead of resetting it during merge cleanup.

A crash pad created before KEdit journaling can restore non-empty text without its original process prefix; the next editor transaction then starts at tx 0 against that text and cannot replay from the actual prior Step. Validate staged KEdits against the real before/after snapshots, preserve valid capture exactly, and collapse only an unusable legacy sequence to one atomic snapshot transition.

The crash-pad overlay copied a stepped file head but omitted its stable traceId, and live Step/create updates advanced only nodeId. Prepared AI operations require both identities, so Inspector continued reporting no stepped provenance after a successful Step. Preserve traceId across pad restore and propagate the backend-persisted or chain-resolved trace identity with each live head update.

The apply validator already rejected model-emitted raw ((…)) syntax, but Extend/Settle author-directive prompt material did not explicitly say that directive markers, instructions, and delimiters are consumable non-output control bytes. Put the consumption rule beside the ordered directives while retaining fail-closed output validation.

Prompt instructions cannot enforce a syntactic consumption invariant reliably across models. At the apply boundary, consume only exact authorized directive markers and raw source bytes from the same prepared operation, then rescan and reject any novel, altered, or malformed ((…)) syntax. This mirrors deterministic protected-anchor restoration without trusting model compliance.

A model can paraphrase an authorized directive into a different well-formed ((…)) span, defeating exact-echo stripping. Because current-session human authority is the only instruction boundary, every well-formed directive candidate in MODEL output is unauthorized control syntax and can be deterministically discarded; retain fail-closed rejection only for malformed/unbalanced syntax with ambiguous boundaries.

Alternate Step, crash recovery, and Prompt Inspector paths must consume canonical post-write trace identity and all-scope evidence. Stale pre-write FileState or per-current-file projections can advance a head while retaining the wrong trace or omit removed-path evidence. Ordinary invalid editor KEdits must fail closed; only an explicitly named crash-recovery boundary may synthesize a coarse transition.

A green current frontend build can disagree with a running Tauri desktop app because npm run build only updates apps/client/dist; the existing .app embeds the frontend from its last Tauri bundle. For desktop dogfood, compare the .app timestamp, run npm run tauri -- build --debug, quit the old process, and relaunch the exact bundle path. Here the stale bundle still decoded folder focus deltas into pathless context entries, while current context-gather source and its focus/rename regression were already correct.

Recursive folder writes landed while AI context, Replay, cold pull, and retry completion still assumed Root-plus-flattened-path addressing or a single publish phase. Resolve flattened paths to direct folder traces, validate chains before derived collapse, and make file/folder retries resume ancestor propagation with per-folder single-flight serialization.
When a structural rename crosses an AI-context shield, project it to a visible-side add/remove; retaining either hidden endpoint leaks excluded path data through provenance.
A repaired crash journal is a machine reconciliation and must use a dedicated reconciler identity; inferring KEdit voice from document runs can falsely attribute synthesized process evidence.

Recursive folder causality is only trustworthy when all seams agree: serialize each folder read-plan-publish append, fail closed on owner/branch/conformance ambiguity in prompt and Replay readers, and persist structural move/delete operation ids plus exact paths before the first relay mutation so attach can resume without minting sibling nodes.

libp2p-kad MemoryStore is a single last-write-wins value per key; default inbound inserts are unfiltered and automatic publication republishes the local value without an application-level read/merge. A multi-writer set encoded as one record therefore needs filtered inbound storage plus an explicit merge-before-every-republish loop, or a different CRDT/sharding design.

Recovery across immutable file or folder TraceNodes and mutable recursive manifests cannot infer progress from an operation id plus current heads. Persist the exact signed node id before direct membership or ancestor propagation, validate its operation/snapshot/hash on retry, refuse rollback from a later member, and clear pending state only after every ancestor converges.

Workspace recursive Step coalescing must use resolved persisted root/path/folder/operation identity, not the caller-requested signer: different caller keys can resolve to one held folder owner, coalesce the selected folder, then otherwise race ancestor upserts. After selected and ancestor publication, re-read the home relay and require one Full Trace owner head whose unique same-operation checkpoint is the exact published node; this detects but cannot prevent interprocess siblings without relay CAS.

Kademlia runtime commands must share one serialized queue and read committed config only when their queued operation executes; otherwise startup, publish, or lookup can restart a stale enabled configuration after Coins is disabled. Same-window config saves also need an explicit subscription because the browser storage event fires only in other tabs.

Racing a Tauri invoke Promise against AbortSignal or a JavaScript timer only releases the webview waiter; the native command and socket/query continue unless an explicit native cancellation handle is propagated. Never put such abandoned invokes behind a shared operation queue.

Compound Mint signed and Stepped its Coin before the retry journal was durable, while Promise timeouts released JavaScript without cancelling native Kademlia or relay work. Fix compound gestures by journaling the exact signed artifact before the first side effect, recovering from stored records, and carrying operation IDs plus AbortSignal cancellation across IPC.

Recursive folder features failed when path/UI indexes or operation ids were treated as the serialization and replay identity. Correctness requires immutable event ids for Replay dedupe, historical membership segments for moved/removed paths, per-resource mutation queues, verified forward folder lineage, and storage-success barriers before recovery journals clear.

When HEAD and reflog never moved but reviewed fixes disappear from a dirty worktree, recover the exact successful apply_patch payloads from the Codex session log before reimplementing. The underlying defects here were side effects preceding the durable Mint journal, uncancelled globally serialized native data-plane work, and bounded stores/queries trusting attacker-controlled ordering or cached failure state.

Folder-zine mutations cannot be serialized or replayed by mutable UI paths or current-head snapshots: all persisted Root mutations need one shared Root-pinned lane, ancestor updates must verify signed forward lineage, and Replay must load membership-pinned path occurrences while retaining removed immutable subtrees for same-node re-adds.

A nested folder membership pin cannot safely derive stable folder identity from the pinned node f tag alone; readers and writers must resolve and verify that exact head through a single-owner folder chain to its claimed genesis before caching or authoring through the identity.

Mint directory membership alone cannot distinguish a published, same-minter-attested Coin from a legacy or interrupted artifact. Persist a completion receipt only after the public pair and membership boundary, preserve it through cache refreshes, and gate every Coin UI/citation inventory entry on that receipt; protocol-side rendezvous must still verify the Coin and attestation cryptographically.

Recursive folder operations failed when mutable projections (current paths, cached trace ids, TraceHead/current-coordinate reads, and successful-only result lists) were treated as authority. Fix by verifying exact signed membership pins through fixed-owner chains, admitting all mutations through one recover-first Root lane, preserving historical path occurrences, and representing every required-load failure in conformance.
A compound public transaction cannot treat independent any-relay successes as atomic when later verification requires both members on one relay; track the successful-relay intersection durably.
Durable absolute source ranges become invalid when concurrent finalizations rewrite the same file; serialize by source or durably rebase before publishing irreversible artifacts.

A libp2p RecordStore must normalize publisher and expiration for owned coordinates on every put, because inbound records control both metadata fields and can even spoof the local publisher; merging only the value lets a short remote TTL expire durable local ownership.

A rendezvous carrying event can cite multiple distinct Coin ids at the same canonical coordinate; marking the event matched after the first verified id prematurely stops later batches and hides exact-byte citations. Aggregate verified targets across all batches before constructing the candidate.

Irreversible multi-relay Coin minting must use a durable shared completion receipt, serialize overlapping source ranges, revalidate the source immediately before publication, and require one relay to accept both genesis and same-minter attestation. Hostile co-citation discovery also needs a sweep-wide byte/time budget in addition to per-query bounds; otherwise bounded individual reads still amplify across peers and targets.

A crash-safe journal for a newly signed immutable event must retain the complete signed public event in the same durable write as its operation metadata; an id and content hash alone cannot republish it after a crash before outbox insertion.

A protocol FULL verdict is broader than selector presentation types: KEdit permits any finite timestamp, non-negative integer transaction id, and arbitrary voice string. Adapter projectors must preserve that accepted domain without inventing signer authority; use a lossless neutral identity encoding and explicit derived-timing overflow state before selector validation.

The desktop relay became an orphan because std::process::Child drop does not terminate the child and cleanup only ran through Tauri ExitRequested. Desktop spawns now pass a private piped stdin and --exit-on-stdin-close; EOF closes the Go listener on any parent-process exit, while same-vault PID recovery remains fallback.

Replay timelines already retained one frame per KEdit transaction and focus selection, but the transport advanced equal-time and sub-frame transitions through raw timers; several React states could commit before a browser paint, so users saw clumped actions. Gate each timer arrival through one requestAnimationFrame and cancel both handles on effect cleanup.
